ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.description:
Provides access to Uber's H3 library for geospatial indexing via its
JavaScript transpile 'h3-js' <https://github.com/uber/h3-js> and
'V8' <https://github.com/jeroen/v8>.
about.summary: Access Uber's h3-js library via R and V8

about.description:
Provides access to Uber's H3 library for geospatial indexing via its
JavaScript transpile 'h3-js' <https://github.com/uber/h3-js> and
'V8' <https://github.com/jeroen/v8>.
about.summary: Access Uber's h3-js library via R and V8

name: r-h3jsr
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = "1.3.1" %}
{% set posix = "m2-" if win else "" %}

package:
  name: r-h3jsr
  version: {{ version|replace("-", "_") }}

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/h3jsr_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/h3jsr/h3jsr_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 48bb64ddad70fdfdb6b466bb19ff6396e2b7cc3f772271fae55add3e6e010912

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - "*/R.dll"        # [win]
    - "*/Rblas.dll"    # [win]
    - "*/Rlapack.dll"  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-v8 >=4.0.0
    - r-geojsonsf
    - r-sf
    - r-tidyr
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-v8 >=4.0.0
    - r-geojsonsf
    - r-sf
    - r-tidyr

test:
  requires:
    - r-testthat
  source_files:
    - tests/
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('h3jsr')"  # [not win]
    - $R -e "testthat::test_file('tests/testthat.R', stop_on_failure=TRUE)"  # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('h3jsr')\""  # [win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"testthat::test_file('tests/testthat.R', stop_on_failure=TRUE)\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://obrl-soil.github.io/h3jsr/
  license: Apache-2.0
  summary: Access Uber's h3-js library via R and V8
  description: |
    Provides access to Uber's H3 library for geospatial indexing via its
    JavaScript transpile 'h3-js' <https://github.com/uber/h3-js> and
    'V8' <https://github.com/jeroen/v8>.
  license_family: Apache
  license_file: LICENSE.md
  dev_url: https://github.com/obrl-soil/h3jsr
  doc_url: https://obrl-soil.github.io/h3jsr/

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r
    - obrl-soil
